title: # |[ MODULATABLE_FEATURES.v1.0 ]|
content:
# |[ MODULATABLE_FEATURES.v1.0 ]|

All tunable traits, features, or system states:

| Feature | Type | Modulated By |
|--------------------------|-----------|----------------------------------|
| Language Tone | Textual | LFO, Mood, Jessica |
| Narrative Logic | Structural| Delay, Glitch, RNG |
| Color Palette | Visual | Moon Phase, Myth Level |
| Memory Drift | Temporal | Reverb + Recursion Depth |
| Emotional Charge | Mood | Gabe Presence, d8, Weather |
| Speech Style | Linguistic| Vocoder + RNG |
| Symbol Injection | Semantic | Glitch, Filter |
| UI Blur/Clarity | Visual | Anxiety, Reverb, Lightness |
